visual_rules.render_style: 3d soft clay illustration with subtle gradients
visual_rules.background: clean warm neutral with soft shapes, no clutter
visual_rules.ui_density: airy and minimal; use generous white space and avoid crowded compositions
visual_rules.component_language: rounded cards, segmented tabs, soft bordered pills, subtle dividers
visual_rules.accent_strategy: primary accent is reserved for CTA buttons, selected tabs, and progress highlights
visual_rules.empty_state_pattern: centered clay illustration + short title + compact helper text + one prominent primary CTA
visual_rules.navigation_pattern: simple bottom nav with calm inactive icons and clear selected state
visual_rules.reference_direction: inspired by modern baby-tracker UI patterns from provided competitor screenshots, without copying brand marks

character_guidelines.baby_style: simplified, neutral, friendly, no detailed facial realism
character_guidelines.parent_style: diverse silhouettes, warm expressions, no logos
character_guidelines.medical_style: clean and reassuring, no fear-based imagery
